resolution: CLOSED by tool unison — the oloid_kinematic frame inversion F has F^2 = pi phase advance (-1 at 2*pi) and F^4 = return to origin (+1 at 4*pi), exactly the SU(2) -> SO(3) double-cover semantics
method: composed the existing oloid_kinematic verifiers in unison (bit-complement inversion, two-period pi phase, four-period origin) — no new mathematics
double_cover_law: F is the frame inversion; F^2 carries the spinor -1 at 2*pi; F^4 = +1 at 4*pi
